flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Scripps College fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (76.5% → 60.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Scripps College rose 13% between 2007 and 2010 ($35.9k → $40.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Scripps College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($58.4k → $66.0k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Scripps College rose 11% between 2007 and 2010 ($10.5k → $11.6k).
